title: HiFi Gibson Assembly (Protocol for the NEBuilder® HiFi DNA Assembly Master Mix)
author: Alba Balletbó

steps_raw.instruction: Set up the following reaction on ice (to 20μl total volume): %s %s
Incubate samples in a thermocycler at 50ºC for 15 minutes (when 2 or 3 fragments are being assembled) or 60 minutes (when 4–6 fragments are being assembled).
Following incubation, store samples on ice or at –20ºC for subsequent transformation.
Transform into chemically competent cells (1-5µL) or in electrocompetent cells (1 µL, diluted 10x or 5 µL, after purification to remove salts).
